name: cc-handoff
description: Codex commands for cc-handoff cross-agent handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Send, request, and pick up cc-handoff packages from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Workflow commands for packaging API changes, sending cross-team requests, pulling pending handoffs, and linking Linear issues through the cc-handoff MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Send this API change with cc-handoff
Pick up the next cc-handoff package
Request a partner change with cc-handoff
